pairs.py:
def count_odd(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value is odd."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v % 2 == 1: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def max_abs(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum absolute node value reachable."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); a = abs(vals[n])
        if a > best: best = a
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

def any_over_limit(spec: dict) -> bool:
    """Return True if any node reachable from start has a reading above limit."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; limit = spec["limit"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if vals[n] > limit: return True
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return False

def edge_weight_product(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Multiply together the fee on every toll gate along the chain of posts."""
    tolls = spec["tolls"]
    prod = 1
    for t in tolls:
        prod *= t
    return prod

def leaves_to_half(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Fewest largest leaves needed to hold half the reachable sap."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]
    seen = []
    queue = [spec["start"]]
    while queue:
        n = queue.pop(0)
        if n in seen:
            continue
        seen.append(n)
        queue.extend(adj[n])
    total = 0
    leaves = []
    for n in seen:
        total += vals[n]
        if not adj[n]:
            leaves.append(vals[n])
    leaves.sort(reverse=True)
    got = 0
    used = 0
    for v in leaves:
        if got * 2 >= total:
            break
        got += v
        used += 1
    if got * 2 >= total:
        return used
    return -1

def reachable_from_root(spec: dict) -> bool:
    """Can the target site be reached from root through the gateways?"""
    seen = []
    stack = list(spec["gateways"])
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen:
            continue
        seen.append(n)
        stack.extend(spec["links"].get(n, []))
    return spec["target"] in seen
